summary: Comprehensive testing of Return Loss Tune fix and Reflector Spacing UI. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI features verified: Reflector Spacing section with 5 presets (V.Close, Close, Normal, Far, V.Far) + Closer/Farther nudge buttons working. Return Loss Tune button working - improved SWR from 2.32:1 to 1.011:1 (excellent match). Fine-Tune Gamma button still works correctly.

issues: data-testid attributes for reflector-nudge-closer and reflector-nudge-farther may not be rendered in Expo web - buttons work but selectors need checking

critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: POST /api/optimize-return-loss now sweeps reflector positions alongside driven and dir1 elements
gamma_recipe is returned with swr_at_null when feed_type is gamma
best_swr improved from 2+ to under 1.1 for gamma feed configurations
Works for 3, 5, and 8 element antennas - all return valid responses
Frontend Reflector Spacing section added above Driven Element Spacing with 5 preset buttons and nudge controls
Return Loss Tune and Fine-Tune Gamma buttons both functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: POST /api/optimize-return-loss endpoint now properly sweeps reflector positions and runs gamma designer on the winning configuration. Frontend has new Reflector Spacing section with V.Close/Close/Normal/Far/V.Far presets and Closer/Farther nudge buttons. Return Loss Tune achieves SWR around 1.01:1 (nearly perfect match).

POST /api/optimize-return-loss sweeps re.evidence: Backend test confirms driven position changes during optimization, and reflector sweep is in the code

POST /api/optimize-return-loss works for.evidence: All three test cases passed with valid responses

POST /api/gamma-fine-tune still works (r.evidence: TestGammaFineTuneRegression tests passed - elements still change during optimization

Frontend: Reflector Spacing section with.evidence: Screenshot shows V.Close (0.10), Close (0.14), Normal (0.18), Far (0.22), V.Far (0.28) buttons

Frontend: Reflector nudge buttons exist.evidence: Playwright clicked both Closer and Farther buttons successfully

Frontend: Fine-Tune Gamma button works.evidence: After click, Gamma SWR improved to 1.00:1

Frontend: Return Loss Tune button works.evidence: After click, shows 'Best Match Found' with Matched SWR: 1.011:1, Gain: 11.91 dBi
